channel.title: Aura Club
channel.description: Handmade crystal & gemstone bracelets. Prices in AUD, incl. GST. Ships Australia-wide.

item.title: Aura Club Aquamarine Dream - Handmade Aquamarine Crystal Bracelet
item.description: The Aquamarine Dream is a handmade stretch bracelet strung with genuine 8mm aquamarine beads for cool-toned calm and clarity. Made to order on durable elastic cord, designed to fit most wrists (16-20cm). A natural gemstone, so every bead is a little different. Ships Australia-wide.

item.title: Aura Club Lapis Lore - Handmade Lapis Lazuli Crystal Bracelet
item.description: The Lapis Lore is a handmade stretch bracelet strung with genuine 8mm lapis lazuli beads flecked with pyrite, in deep royal blue with a hint of gold. Made to order on durable elastic cord, fits most wrists (16-20cm). A natural gemstone; gold flecks vary bead to bead. Ships Australia-wide.

item.title: Aura Club Red Jasper Rush - Handmade Red Jasper Crystal Bracelet
item.description: The Red Jasper Rush is a handmade stretch bracelet strung with genuine 8mm red jasper beads for earthy, grounding, confident energy. Made to order on durable elastic cord, fits most wrists (16-20cm). A natural gemstone; warm reds shift in the light. Ships Australia-wide.

item.title: Aura Club Turquoise Talisman - Handmade Turquoise Crystal Bracelet
item.description: The Turquoise Talisman is a handmade stretch bracelet strung with genuine 8mm turquoise (howlite-matrix) beads, the classic good-luck stone. Made to order on durable elastic cord, fits most wrists (16-20cm). A natural gemstone; matrix veining is one of a kind. Ships Australia-wide.
